action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP-L/14 8 epochs gives val worst 0.5816 (Africa), overall 0.7064. Training each epoch ~305s = ~5 min, validation also takes time. 8 epochs took ~2563s (~43 min). Test typically ~0.15-0.20 lower than val based on earlier B/16 result. Analysis: We have 9.25h left (~33000s), 25 iterations remaining. Submitting eval to verify test performance is critical now. Then can plan further improvements (more epochs, ensembling, FLYP-style, etc.). Decision: Submit eval of current best L/14 checkpoint to measure test worst-region.
